generated_oml:

import "http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#" as base

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor measuring internal incubator environment",
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements from incubator environment",
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimization, RabbitMQMiddleware
]

instance GeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model representing physical dimensions of thermal incubator",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RaspberryPiController
]

instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Differential equations modeling thermal dynamics of incubator",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimization
]

instance CyberPhysicalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Integrated model combining physical and cyber components of incubator system",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQMiddleware, RaspberryPiController
]

instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B embedded controller for hardware interfacing",
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, MonitoringService, ControlService
]

instance RabbitMQMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message-oriented middleware for real-time data communication",
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, MonitoringService
]

instance ScipyOptimization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy library for parameter optimization and calibration algorithms",
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Reproduces and predicts Physical Twin behavior for operational decisions",
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictedBehaviorInsight
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Checks safety and optimal performance of Physical Twin",
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight, FaultDetectedInsight, StateEstimationInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Performs algorithmic optimization for system parameters",
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalParametersInsight
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Executes supervisory control actions based on monitoring and simulation",
    DTDFVocab:provides SupervisoryControlAction
]

instance PredictedBehaviorInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulated future behavior of thermal incubator for operational planning"
]

instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of safety threshold breaches in incubator environment"
]

instance OptimalParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal temperature and fan settings derived from optimization algorithms"
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of system faults through fault detection algorithms"
]

instance StateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated internal state of incubator based on sensor data and models"
]

instance SupervisoryControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of heatbed power based on supervisory controller",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin integrates modeling, simulation, monitoring, and optimization technologies through a structure where sensor data is processed by calibration algorithms to update models of the cyber-physical system and environment, informing monitoring systems for safety and optimization checks, with human or algorithmic interventions triggered upon violation detection."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is maintained via calibration algorithms adjusting parameters using sensor data to reflect Physical Twin behavior, with monitoring systems validating safety and optimality against predefined thresholds. Violation detection triggers corrective actions to the Physical Twin."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "A safe protocol is incorporated into the low-level driver to maintain device safety, with system monitors checking for safe and optimal performance; when violations are detected, humans or algorithms initiate corrective actions to the physical twin."
]
